summary: Closed the remaining PM-003 and revision-negotiation gaps by making postmortem issue counts canonical across writers and requiring non-empty fix_items_map output in revision mode.
highlights: PM-003 now has the same four-field shape across run-postmortem and cycle-postmortem paths.
Board-path PM-003 now receives validation issue counts from executeBoard context.
Revision mode now blocks on missing or empty fix_items_map.
